content:
# Session 13 (iter-013) ‚Äî review

## Metadata
- File: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` (single prover lane, model opus).
- Sorry count: **6 ‚Üí 6** (unchanged in number; B4's sorry MOVED to the strictly-simpler ‚òÖ core).
- Build: GREEN (cold `lake build`, 2439 jobs, no kernel timeout). `lean_verify sheafification_map_unit_eq = [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.
- Targets attempted: B4 `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` (must-fix), + new helper `sheafification_map_unit_eq`, + new core ‚òÖ `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf`. B6/B7 deferred (budget).

## What landed
### `sheafification_map_unit_eq` (SOLVED, axiom-clean, ~L2440)
Left-triangle identity `L.map Œ∑_P = Œµ_{LP}‚Åª¬π`.
- Attempt 1 (FAILED): `rw [‚Üê Category.comp_id ‚Ä¶, ‚Üê (sheafificationCounitIso _).hom_inv_id, ‚Üê Category.assoc, h, Category.id_comp]` ‚Üí `Did not find an occurrence of the pattern ùüô (sheafification.obj ‚Ä¶)` (the `Functor.id_obj` decoration on the identity blocks positional `rw`).
- Attempt 2 (SUCCESS): `simp only [Functor.id_obj] at h; exact (Iso.comp_hom_eq_id _).mp h`, where `h := adjunction.left_triangle_components P`. Clean.

### B4 `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` (REDUCED to ‚òÖ; body now compiles, ~L2497)
Œ∑-naturality reduction: `T := toPresheafOfModules X = SheafOfModules.forget` sends `f ‚Ü¶ f.val`; applying unit-naturality 3√ó (to `Œ∑_{A‚äó‚ÇöB}‚ñ∑C`, `Œ±^p`, `A‚óÅŒ∑_{B‚äó‚ÇöC}`) collapses BOTH sides to `Œ∑_{(A‚äó‚ÇöB)‚äó‚ÇöC} ‚â´ T.map Œ¶`, reducing B4 to `Œ¶_L = Œ¶_R` in `X.Modules` ‚Äî exactly ‚òÖ.
- Attempt 1 (FAILED): bundled `rw [hval, hnatL, Category.assoc, ‚Üê Functor.map_comp, key, Functor.map_comp]; conv_rhs => rw [‚Ä¶]` ‚Üí `Did not find an occurrence of the pattern (?f ‚â´ ?g) ‚â´ ?h`. `Category.assoc` won't fire under the `restrictScalars(ùüô)` decoration via plain `rw`.
- Attempt 2 (SUCCESS): `rw [hval, hnatL]; erw [Category.assoc, ‚Üê Functor.map_comp, key, Functor.map_comp, hnatR]; erw [‚Üê Category.assoc, ‚Üê Category.assoc, hnatA]; rfl`. `erw` matches up to defeq across the decoration. `sorryAx` now traces SOLELY to ‚òÖ (auditor + prover `lean_verify` confirmed; no circularity).

### ‚òÖ `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf` (NEW typed sorry, ~L2458) ‚Äî OPEN
Isolated B4 content, entirely inside `X.Modules` (no `.val`/presheaf descent). Statement `L(Œ∑_{A‚äó‚ÇöB}‚ñ∑C) ‚â´ tensorObjAssoc = L(Œ±^p) ‚â´ L(A‚óÅŒ∑_{B‚äó‚ÇöC})`. Auditor: well-formed, non-trivial, NOT defeq-laundered. Full proof plan documented in the sorry body. Blocker is a ~15‚Äì25 step `Œº`-conjugation cancellation grind where every step bridges the `restrictScalars(ùüô)` decoration with `erw` ‚Äî tractable, no missing ingredient (`Œº_natural_left/right`, `associator_hom_app`, `sheafification_map_unit_eq` all present).

### B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc`, B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` ‚Äî UNTOUCHED (budget)

## Key findings / patterns
- **Sheaf-level beats `.val`-descent.** Stating B4's content inside `X.Modules` (‚òÖ) sidesteps the `CommRing`-behind-`forget‚ÇÇ` instance diamond that ate iters 011/012; the bridge lemmas + `Localization.Monoidal.*` all live at the sheaf level.
- **`restrictScalars(ùüô)` decoration is the recurring micro-blocker.** The sheafification adjunction's right adjoint is `forget ‚ãô restrictScalars(ùüô)`, defeq-but-not-syntactically `forget`. The shared middle object is represented two defeq-distinct ways ‚áí positional `rw`/`Category.assoc`/`Functor.map_comp` fail; the fix is to state unit-naturality `have`s in clean `toPresheafOfModules` form (proved by `exact ‚Ä¶ .unit.naturality _`) and drive cancellation with `erw`. This recipe is now proven on B4 and is the template for ‚òÖ.
- **`Iso.comp_hom_eq_id`** converts a left-triangle `f ‚â´ Œµ.hom = ùüô` into `f = Œµ.inv` cleanly (reusable for adjunction-unit/counit identities).

## Verification (both highly-recommended subagents dispatched)
- **lean-auditor** `iter013` (8 files, 0 must-fix / 3 major / 2 minor): new code genuine + axiom-clean; ‚òÖ honest typed sorry, `sorryAx` solely via ‚òÖ, no circularity; all 6 sorries honest, no laundering. 3 majors = STALE COMMENTS (in `.lean`, not editable by review): SGR L731‚Äì784 "NEXT-ITER HANDLES" block (already implemented), SGR L2787 "single remaining sorry of that chain" (B4 now proved), RelativeSpec.lean L701‚Äì706 docstring ("left as sorry" but body concrete). ‚Üí recommendations.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter013` (NEEDS-FIX, 1 must-fix / 1 major / 1 minor): must-fix = proof-block `\leanok` on `lem:tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` (sorryAx via ‚òÖ) ‚Äî ADDRESSED (see overrides). Major = ‚òÖ coverage gap (no blueprint block) ‚Üí recommendations. Minor = `sheafification_map_unit_eq` unreferenced ‚Üí recommendations (coverage).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor`: **removed proof-block `\leanok`** (override of sync_leanok's iter-013 `added:1`). Justification: the lemma's own body compiles but carries `sorryAx` transitively via the new ‚òÖ core (`lean_verify`-confirmed by the checker AND prover); a proof `\leanok` falsely marks B4 closed and hides ‚òÖ as the DAG frontier. Replaced with a `% NOTE:` recording the override.
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul`: **removed proof-block `\leanok`** (same reason; B5 carries `sorryAx` via B4 ‚Üí ‚òÖ). `% NOTE:` added. Statement-level `\leanok` retained on both (declarations exist and compile).

## Blueprint doctor
All findings are in DEFERRED chapters (Cohomology_FlatBaseChange covers two non-existent files; broken `\ref`/`\cref`/`\uses` in Cohomology_FlatBaseChange / Picard_GlueDescent / Picard_QuotScheme) ‚Äî out-of-cone merge-back extraction artifacts, unchanged from prior iters. Active chapter (Picard_SectionGradedRing) clean. Not edited.

## Coverage debt (`archon dag-query unmatched` = 326)
Two NEW SNAP decls this iter lack blueprint blocks (listed in recommendations for the planner): `sheafification_map_unit_eq`, `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf`. Bulk 324 are inherited `Grassmannian.*`/`GradedModule.*` out-of-cone extraction artifacts (merge-time).

## Notes (LOW)
- `sheafification_map_unit_eq` is proven but not yet referenced (its consumer ‚òÖ is still sorry) ‚Äî expected, not dead code.
